rationale: Both papers are in the same methodological niche (market-structure/positioning maps with MDS-family approaches), and the cited paper specifically contributes clusterwise bilinear MDS with overlapping memberships, which is highly relevant to the citing paper’s multimarket-membership mapping problem. Given the citing note’s emphasis on improving prior map methods and benchmarking against alternative mapping methods, this citation is plausibly methodological/foundational rather than an incidental mention.
